title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code in three deployment modes: desktop app, terminal CLI, and VS Code extension. The project creates an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator with personalized recommendations, covering installation, setup, and practical debugging.
